title: Get It in
lyrics: You know I can't tell you how you should live it in We gon' give it in I can't tell you how you should live it in We gon' give it in You know I can't tell you how you should live it in When we get it in When we get it in, we gettin' money We makin' niggas laugh, it's so funny Life's like a bunny You gotta love and treat her good And she'll bring you that honey like a bee Flyin' through the breeze, I'm a G Cruisin' through these streets and I'm a OG So you know me, so OG Don't approach me with animosity Hatred is I can't hang with I'ma get it in, can you paint this? You know I can't tell you how you should live it in When we get it in You know I can't tell you how you should live it in When we get it in You know I can't tell you how you should live it in When we get it in We get it in, we win, you lose Ha-ha, because you snooze in while we out workin' Every fuckin' day to get that money we hurtin' But it's nothin', we gettin' better by time Tryin' to climb as head of our time We been born in 81, now it's 2021 It's time to come with them guns We use words as our weapons Mic on a pen, writing the sand But we don't like the sand behind Cause we got kids, we doin' the thing You wanna get it in, we choosin' the same thing It's hard to make money, bitch, when you get it in You know I'm good for it, good for it, good for it Bitch, and you know me, bitch, you know me You know I'm good for it, good for it, good for it Pockets, pockets, pockets, thank you for the money I don't even know if you even understand I gave you so much lies, you brought some motherfucker in the hand And the man doesn't understand It's just a game, man A game where you take it over Fuckin' like a first street motherfucker We touch down next time, next time you'll think When you try to get it in, you get it in When we get it in, you come out and kill me Now you hearin' me? Are you forcin'?
